sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89399" key="prosqafai/resis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσθαφαίρ-εσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, Astron., <sense id="n89399.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">addition or subtraction as required</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ptol.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Alm.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.2</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:23:33" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">23.33</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4036.tlg002:3:89" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Hyp.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.89</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(2).129</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
